comments: TV reports that Gary Moore is currently in the studio recording a session for future broadcast.
Tommy criticises the sound of the Mama's Boys production but says the playing and writing is excellent.
The then-new Van Halen single and video was to be delivered to Saturday Superstore by a parachutist the next day.
Tommy wishes Ronnie Lane all the best for his future.

sessions.artist: Alaska: Recorded 13 January 1984 produced by Tony Wilson
sessions.details: Bernie Marsden (guitar), John Marter (drums), Robbie Hawthorne (vocals), Richard Bailey (keyboards), Brian Badhams (bass).

sessions.artist: Archive sets by The Faces from 1970 and 1971
